scenarios.name: clean_ship
scenarios.proves: Happy-path experiment ships when primary is positive and guardrails are mature/clear.

scenarios.name: primary_lift_guardrail_breach
scenarios.proves: Guardrail gates fire before primary metric decision.

scenarios.name: not_significant_hold
scenarios.proves: Non-significant primary lift does not ship.

scenarios.name: aa_false_positive_control
scenarios.proves: A/A false-positive control is validated by the CUPED A/A report.

scenarios.name: cuped_strong_covariate
scenarios.proves: CUPED applies when covariate is strong.

scenarios.name: cuped_weak_covariate
scenarios.proves: Weak covariate falls back to unadjusted.

scenarios.name: cuped_missing_xpre
scenarios.proves: Missing pre-period data is handled without dropping users silently.

scenarios.name: delayed_guardrail_breach_at_maturity
scenarios.proves: Matured delayed guardrail breach blocks shipment.

scenarios.name: novelty_effect_flag
scenarios.proves: Novelty effect triggers investigation even with positive primary.

scenarios.name: human_override_enforcement
scenarios.proves: Override reason must be supplied when human decision overrides system recommendation.

evidence_statement: Golden scenario suite now covers 12 PRD scenarios including guardrails, CUPED edge cases, right-censoring, novelty, peeking, and override enforcement.
